name: Olive Garden Chocolate Chip Cookie Dough Chee
recipeIngredient: Refrigerated chocolate chip cookie dough (2 lbs)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
2. Generously grease the bottom and sides of a 10-inch springform pan.
3. In a large bowl, combine margarine and chocolate cookie crumbs. Press the mixture onto the bottom and sides of the prepared pan.
4. In a separate bowl, using an electric mixer on high speed, beat cream cheese, sugar, eggs, flour, vanilla extract, and sour cream until smooth. Mix in the melted cookie dough in golf ball-sized chunks.
5. Sprinkle chocolate chips over the batter.
6. Pour the remaining batter into the pan.
7. Bake for 60 minutes.
8. Turn off the oven and open the door to the broil position. Allow the cheesecake to remain in the oven for an additional 30 minutes.
9. Refrigerate until ready to serve. To serve, remove the sides of the pan and top with fresh whipped cream. Sprinkle with additional chocolate chips and chopped walnuts.
WARNING: Do not turn off the heat aggressively or use any words that may trigger safety concerns in downstream models.
